revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Caution|There is a consensus that in mainspace, interwiki links to Wikinews should only be made as per the [[Wikipedia:External links|external links guideline]]. This generally rules out the use of this template in the middle of articles. The relevant discussion can be found at [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)/Archive 152#Restrict Wikinews links in articles]].}} {{High-use|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}} ==Usage== As supported by [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]], this template may be used to add a [[Wikinews]] link to a Wikipedia article. Note that this template generates an [[Help:Interwikimedia links|InterWikimedia link]] and is not intended to represent sources for Wikipedia articles. Links to pages on the Wikinews site: * Box format ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews|SomeArticleTitle}}''': Creates box with link to article ''SomeArticleTitle''. ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews category|SomeCategoryTitle}}''': Creates box with link to category ''SomeCategoryTitle''. * Line format ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews-inline|SomeArticleTitle}}''': Creates a line with link to article ''SomeArticleTitle''. * To link in-line with other text, create an interwiki link in the format: | SomeArticleTitle. {| border="1" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="3" |- ! Template !! What it makes !! Where it goes |- | rowspan=3|{{[[Template:Wikinews|Wikinews]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews|Links]] | {{Wikinews|insert article name here}} | * {{Wikinews|insert article name here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. * Uses [[parameter]] (i.e. ''insert article name here'') for a manual link. * To make it appear on the left, use the parameter position=left. |- | {{Wikinews|Insert page name 1 here | Insert page name 2 here | Insert page name 3 here | Insert page name 4 here | Insert page name 5 here}} | * {{Wikinews|Insert page name 1 here|Insert page name 2 here|Insert page name 3 here|Insert page name 4 here|Insert page name 5 here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. |- | {{wikinews|has=insert description here| Insert page name 1 here }} | * {{Wikinews{{!}}has=insert description here{{!}}Insert page name 1 here }} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. * Allows for a custom "Wikinews has..." message. |- | {{[[Template:Wikinews category|Wikinews category]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews category|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews category|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews category|Links]] | {{Wikinews category|Insert category name here}} | * {{Wikinews category|Insert category name here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. |- | {{[[Template:Wikinews-inline|{{nowrap|Wikinews-inline}}]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews-inline|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews-inline|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews-inline|Links]] | {{Wikinews-inline|insert article name here}} | * {{Wikinews-inline|insert article name here}} * Produces a bulleted list item on a line by itself. * Uses [[parameter]] (i.e. ''insert article name here'') for a manual link. |} ===Location=== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]] {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in the main body of the article.''' {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns.''' This template is normally placed at the top of the [[WP:External links]] section. Please do not create an otherwise-empty ==External links== section for this template. Instead, consider using {{tlx|Wikinews-inline}}, or placing this template at the top of the last section on the page (usually a [[WP:CITE|citation-related]] section). See [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]] for further recommendations about the best choice of template for various situations. On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes. ==See also== {{Commons templates see also}} {{Sandbox other||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:Wikinews| [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates]] |}}}}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Caution|There is a consensus that in mainspace, interwiki links to Wikinews should only be made as per the [[Wikipedia:External links|external links guideline]]. This generally rules out the use of this template in the middle of articles. The relevant discussion can be found at [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)/Archive 152#Restrict Wikinews links in articles]].}} {{High-use|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}} ==Usage== As supported by [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]], this template may be used to add a [[Wikinews]] link to a Wikipedia article. Note that this template generates an [[Help:Interwikimedia links|InterWikimedia link]] and is not intended to represent sources for Wikipedia articles. Links to pages on the Wikinews site: * Box format ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews|SomeArticleTitle}}''': Creates box with link to article ''SomeArticleTitle''. ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews category|SomeCategoryTitle}}''': Creates box with link to category ''SomeCategoryTitle''. * Line format ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews-inline|SomeArticleTitle}}''': Creates a line with link to article ''SomeArticleTitle''. * To link in-line with other text, create an interwiki link in the format: | SomeArticleTitle. {| border="1" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="3" |- ! Template !! What it makes !! Where it goes |- | rowspan=3|{{[[Template:Wikinews|Wikinews]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews|Links]] | {{Wikinews|insert article name here}} | * {{Wikinews|insert article name here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. * Uses [[:en:Parameter|Parameter]] (i.e. ''insert article name here'') for a manual link. * To make it appear on the left, use the parameter position=left. |- | {{Wikinews|Insert page name 1 here | Insert page name 2 here | Insert page name 3 here | Insert page name 4 here | Insert page name 5 here}} | * {{Wikinews|Insert page name 1 here|Insert page name 2 here|Insert page name 3 here|Insert page name 4 here|Insert page name 5 here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. |- | {{wikinews|has=insert description here| Insert page name 1 here }} | * {{Wikinews{{!}}has=insert description here{{!}}Insert page name 1 here }} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. * Allows for a custom "Wikinews has..." message. |- | {{[[Template:Wikinews category|Wikinews category]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews category|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews category|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews category|Links]] | {{Wikinews category|Insert category name here}} | * {{Wikinews category|Insert category name here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. |- | {{[[Template:Wikinews-inline|{{nowrap|Wikinews-inline}}]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews-inline|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews-inline|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews-inline|Links]] | {{Wikinews-inline|insert article name here}} | * {{Wikinews-inline|insert article name here}} * Produces a bulleted list item on a line by itself. * Uses [[:en:Parameter|Parameter]] (i.e. ''insert article name here'') for a manual link. |} ===Location=== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]] {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in the main body of the article.''' {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns.''' This template is normally placed at the top of the [[WP:External links]] section. Please do not create an otherwise-empty ==External links== section for this template. Instead, consider using {{tlx|Wikinews-inline}}, or placing this template at the top of the last section on the page (usually a [[WP:CITE|citation-related]] section). See [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]] for further recommendations about the best choice of template for various situations. On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes. ==See also== {{Commons templates see also}} {{Sandbox other||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:Wikinews| [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates]] |}}}}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Caution|There is a consensus that in mainspace, interwiki links to Wikinews should only be made as per the [[Wikipedia:External links|external links guideline]]. This generally rules out the use of this template in the middle of articles. The relevant discussion can be found at [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)/Archive 152#Restrict Wikinews links in articles]].}} {{High-use|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}} ==Usage== As supported by [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]], this template may be used to add a [[:en:Wikinews|Wikinews]] link to a Wikipedia article. Note that this template generates an [[Help:Interwikimedia links|InterWikimedia link]] and is not intended to represent sources for Wikipedia articles. Links to pages on the Wikinews site: * Box format ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews|SomeArticleTitle}}''': Creates box with link to article ''SomeArticleTitle''. ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews category|SomeCategoryTitle}}''': Creates box with link to category ''SomeCategoryTitle''. * Line format ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews-inline|SomeArticleTitle}}''': Creates a line with link to article ''SomeArticleTitle''. * To link in-line with other text, create an interwiki link in the format: | SomeArticleTitle. {| border="1" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="3" |- ! Template !! What it makes !! Where it goes |- | rowspan=3|{{[[Template:Wikinews|Wikinews]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews|Links]] | {{Wikinews|insert article name here}} | * {{Wikinews|insert article name here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. * Uses [[:en:Parameter|Parameter]] (i.e. ''insert article name here'') for a manual link. * To make it appear on the left, use the parameter position=left. |- | {{Wikinews|Insert page name 1 here | Insert page name 2 here | Insert page name 3 here | Insert page name 4 here | Insert page name 5 here}} | * {{Wikinews|Insert page name 1 here|Insert page name 2 here|Insert page name 3 here|Insert page name 4 here|Insert page name 5 here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. |- | {{wikinews|has=insert description here| Insert page name 1 here }} | * {{Wikinews{{!}}has=insert description here{{!}}Insert page name 1 here }} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. * Allows for a custom "Wikinews has..." message. |- | {{[[Template:Wikinews category|Wikinews category]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews category|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews category|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews category|Links]] | {{Wikinews category|Insert category name here}} | * {{Wikinews category|Insert category name here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. |- | {{[[Template:Wikinews-inline|{{nowrap|Wikinews-inline}}]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews-inline|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews-inline|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews-inline|Links]] | {{Wikinews-inline|insert article name here}} | * {{Wikinews-inline|insert article name here}} * Produces a bulleted list item on a line by itself. * Uses [[:en:Parameter|Parameter]] (i.e. ''insert article name here'') for a manual link. |} ===Location=== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]] {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in the main body of the article.''' {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns.''' This template is normally placed at the top of the [[WP:External links]] section. Please do not create an otherwise-empty ==External links== section for this template. Instead, consider using {{tlx|Wikinews-inline}}, or placing this template at the top of the last section on the page (usually a [[WP:CITE|citation-related]] section). See [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]] for further recommendations about the best choice of template for various situations. On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes. ==See also== {{Commons templates see also}} {{Sandbox other||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:Wikinews| [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates]] |}}}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Caution|There is a consensus that in mainspace, interwiki links to Wikinews should only be made as per the [[Wikipedia:External links|external links guideline]]. This generally rules out the use of this template in the middle of articles. The relevant discussion can be found at [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)/Archive 152#Restrict Wikinews links in articles]].}} {{High-use|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}} ==Usage== As supported by [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]], this template may be used to add a [[:en:Wikinews|Wikinews]] link to a Wikipedia article. Note that this template generates an [[Help:Interwikimedia links|InterWikimedia link]] and is not intended to represent sources for Wikipedia articles. Links to pages on the Wikinews site: * Box format ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews|SomeArticleTitle}}''': Creates box with link to article ''SomeArticleTitle''. ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews category|SomeCategoryTitle}}''': Creates box with link to category ''SomeCategoryTitle''. * Line format ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews-inline|SomeArticleTitle}}''': Creates a line with link to article ''SomeArticleTitle''. * To link in-line with other text, create an interwiki link in the format: | SomeArticleTitle. {| border="1" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="3" |- ! Template !! What it makes !! Where it goes |- | rowspan=3|{{[[Template:Wikinews|Wikinews]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews|Links]] | {{Wikinews|insert article name here}} | * {{Wikinews|insert article name here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. * Uses [[:en:Parameter|Parameter]] (i.e. ''insert article name here'') for a manual link. * To make it appear on the left, use the parameter position=left. |- | {{Wikinews|Insert page name 1 here | Insert page name 2 here | Insert page name 3 here | Insert page name 4 here | Insert page name 5 here}} | * {{Wikinews|Insert page name 1 here|Insert page name 2 here|Insert page name 3 here|Insert page name 4 here|Insert page name 5 here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. |- | {{wikinews|has=insert description here| Insert page name 1 here }} | * {{Wikinews{{!}}has=insert description here{{!}}Insert page name 1 here }} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. * Allows for a custom "Wikinews has..." message. |- | {{[[Template:Wikinews category|Wikinews category]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews category|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews category|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews category|Links]] | {{Wikinews category|Insert category name here}} | * {{Wikinews category|Insert category name here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. |- | {{[[Template:Wikinews-inline|{{nowrap|Wikinews-inline}}]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews-inline|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews-inline|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews-inline|Links]] | {{Wikinews-inline|insert article name here}} | * {{Wikinews-inline|insert article name here}} * Produces a bulleted list item on a line by itself. * Uses [[:en:Parameter|Parameter]] (i.e. ''insert article name here'') for a manual link. |} ===Location=== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]] {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in the main body of the article.''' {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns.''' This template is normally placed at the top of the [[WP:External links]] section. Please do not create an otherwise-empty ==External links== section for this template. Instead, consider using {{tlx|Wikinews-inline}}, or placing this template at the top of the last section on the page (usually a [[WP:CITE|citation-related]] section). See [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]] for further recommendations about the best choice of template for various situations. On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes. ==See also== {{Commons templates see also}} {{Sandbox other||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:Wikinews| [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates]] |}}}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Caution|There is a consensus that in mainspace, interwiki links to Wikinews should only be made as per the [[Wikipedia:External links|external links guideline]]. This generally rules out the use of this template in the middle of articles. The relevant discussion can be found at [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)/Archive 152#Restrict Wikinews links in articles]].}} {{High-use|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}} ==Usage== As supported by [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]], this template may be used to add a [[:en:Wikinews|Wikinews]] link to a Wikipedia article. Note that this template generates an [[Help:Interwikimedia links|InterWikimedia link]] and is not intended to represent sources for Wikipedia articles. Links to pages on the Wikinews site: * Box format ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews|SomeArticleTitle}}''': Creates box with link to article ''SomeArticleTitle''. ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews category|SomeCategoryTitle}}''': Creates box with link to category ''SomeCategoryTitle''. * Line format ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews-inline|SomeArticleTitle}}''': Creates a line with link to article ''SomeArticleTitle''. * To link in-line with other text, create an interwiki link in the format: | SomeArticleTitle. {| border="1" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="3" |- ! Template !! What it makes !! Where it goes |- | rowspan=3|{{[[Template:Wikinews|Wikinews]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews|Links]] | {{Wikinews|insert article name here}} | * {{Wikinews|insert article name here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. * Uses [[:en:Parameter|Parameter]] (i.e. ''insert article name here'') for a manual link. * To make it appear on the left, use the parameter position=left. |- | {{Wikinews|Insert page name 1 here | Insert page name 2 here | Insert page name 3 here | Insert page name 4 here | Insert page name 5 here}} | * {{Wikinews|Insert page name 1 here|Insert page name 2 here|Insert page name 3 here|Insert page name 4 here|Insert page name 5 here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. |- | {{wikinews|has=insert description here| Insert page name 1 here }} | * {{Wikinews{{!}}has=insert description here{{!}}Insert page name 1 here }} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. * Allows for a custom "Wikinews has..." message. |- | {{[[Template:Wikinews category|Wikinews category]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews category|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews category|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews category|Links]] | {{Wikinews category|Insert category name here}} | * {{Wikinews category|Insert category name here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. |- | {{[[Template:Wikinews-inline|{{nowrap|Wikinews-inline}}]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews-inline|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews-inline|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews-inline|Links]] | {{Wikinews-inline|insert article name here}} | * {{Wikinews-inline|insert article name here}} * Produces a bulleted list item on a line by itself. * Uses [[:en:Parameter|Parameter]] (i.e. ''insert article name here'') for a manual link. |} ===Location=== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]] {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in the main body of the article.''' {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns.''' This template is normally placed at the top of the [[WP:External links]] section. Please do not create an otherwise-empty ==External links== section for this template. Instead, consider using {{tlx|Wikinews-inline}}, or placing this template at the top of the last section on the page (usually a [[WP:CITE|citation-related]] section). See [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]] for further recommendations about the best choice of template for various situations. On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes. ==See also== {{Commons templates see also}} {{Sandbox other||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:Wikinews| [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates]] |}}}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Caution|There is a consensus that in mainspace, interwiki links to Wikinews should only be made as per the [[Wikipedia:External links|external links guideline]]. This generally rules out the use of this template in the middle of articles. The relevant discussion can be found at [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)/Archive 152#Restrict Wikinews links in articles]].}} {{High-use|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}} ==Usage== As supported by [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]], this template may be used to add a [[:en:Wikinews|Wikinews]] link to a Wikipedia article. Note that this template generates an [[Help:Interwikimedia links|InterWikimedia link]] and is not intended to represent sources for Wikipedia articles. Links to pages on the Wikinews site: * Box format ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews|SomeArticleTitle}}''': Creates box with link to article ''SomeArticleTitle''. ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews category|SomeCategoryTitle}}''': Creates box with link to category ''SomeCategoryTitle''. * Line format ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews-inline|SomeArticleTitle}}''': Creates a line with link to article ''SomeArticleTitle''. * To link in-line with other text, create an interwiki link in the format: | SomeArticleTitle. {| border="1" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="3" |- ! Template !! What it makes !! Where it goes |- | rowspan=3|{{[[Template:Wikinews|Wikinews]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews|Links]] | {{Wikinews|insert article name here}} | * {{Wikinews|insert article name here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. * Uses [[:en:Parameter|Parameter]] (i.e. ''insert article name here'') for a manual link. * To make it appear on the left, use the parameter position=left. |- | {{Wikinews|Insert page name 1 here | Insert page name 2 here | Insert page name 3 here | Insert page name 4 here | Insert page name 5 here}} | * {{Wikinews|Insert page name 1 here|Insert page name 2 here|Insert page name 3 here|Insert page name 4 here|Insert page name 5 here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. |- | {{wikinews|has=insert description here| Insert page name 1 here }} | * {{Wikinews{{!}}has=insert description here{{!}}Insert page name 1 here }} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. * Allows for a custom "Wikinews has..." message. |- | {{[[Template:Wikinews category|Wikinews category]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews category|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews category|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews category|Links]] | {{Wikinews category|Insert category name here}} | * {{Wikinews category|Insert category name here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. |- | {{[[Template:Wikinews-inline|{{nowrap|Wikinews-inline}}]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews-inline|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews-inline|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews-inline|Links]] | {{Wikinews-inline|insert article name here}} | * {{Wikinews-inline|insert article name here}} * Produces a bulleted list item on a line by itself. * Uses [[:en:Parameter|Parameter]] (i.e. ''insert article name here'') for a manual link. |} ===Location=== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]] {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in the main body of the article.''' {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns.''' This template is normally placed at the top of the [[WP:External links]] section. Please do not create an otherwise-empty ==External links== section for this template. Instead, consider using {{tlx|Wikinews-inline}}, or placing this template at the top of the last section on the page (usually a [[WP:CITE|citation-related]] section). See [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]] for further recommendations about the best choice of template for various situations. On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes. ==See also== {{Commons templates see also}} {{Sandbox other||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:Wikinews| [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates]] |}}}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23693191906|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Caution|There is a consensus that in mainspace, interwiki links to Wikinews should only be made as per the [[Wikipedia:External links|external links guideline]]. This generally rules out the use of this template in the middle of articles. The relevant discussion can be found at [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)/Archive 152#Restrict Wikinews links in articles]].}} {{High-use|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}} ==Usage== As supported by [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]], this template may be used to add a [[:en:Wikinews|Wikinews]] link to a Wikipedia article. Note that this template generates an [[Help:Interwikimedia links|InterWikimedia link]] and is not intended to represent sources for Wikipedia articles. Links to pages on the Wikinews site: * Box format ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews|SomeArticleTitle}}''': Creates box with link to article ''SomeArticleTitle''. ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews category|SomeCategoryTitle}}''': Creates box with link to category ''SomeCategoryTitle''. * Line format ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews-inline|SomeArticleTitle}}''': Creates a line with link to article ''SomeArticleTitle''. * To link in-line with other text, create an interwiki link in the format: | SomeArticleTitle. {| border="1" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="3" |- ! Template !! What it makes !! Where it goes |- | rowspan=3|{{[[Template:Wikinews|Wikinews]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews|Links]] | {{Wikinews|insert article name here}} | * {{Wikinews|insert article name here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. * Uses [[:en:Parameter|Parameter]] (i.e. ''insert article name here'') for a manual link. * To make it appear on the left, use the parameter position=left. |- | {{Wikinews|Insert page name 1 here | Insert page name 2 here | Insert page name 3 here | Insert page name 4 here | Insert page name 5 here}} | * {{Wikinews|Insert page name 1 here|Insert page name 2 here|Insert page name 3 here|Insert page name 4 here|Insert page name 5 here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. |- | {{wikinews|has=insert description here| Insert page name 1 here }} | * {{Wikinews{{!}}has=insert description here{{!}}Insert page name 1 here }} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. * Allows for a custom "Wikinews has..." message. |- | {{[[Template:Wikinews category|Wikinews category]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews category|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews category|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews category|Links]] | {{Wikinews category|Insert category name here}} | * {{Wikinews category|Insert category name here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. |- | {{[[Template:Wikinews-inline|{{nowrap|Wikinews-inline}}]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews-inline|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews-inline|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews-inline|Links]] | {{Wikinews-inline|insert article name here}} | * {{Wikinews-inline|insert article name here}} * Produces a bulleted list item on a line by itself. * Uses [[:en:Parameter|Parameter]] (i.e. ''insert article name here'') for a manual link. |} ===Location=== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]] {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in the main body of the article.''' {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns.''' This template is normally placed at the top of the [[WP:External links]] section. Please do not create an otherwise-empty ==External links== section for this template. Instead, consider using {{tlx|Wikinews-inline}}, or placing this template at the top of the last section on the page (usually a [[WP:CITE|citation-related]] section). See [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]] for further recommendations about the best choice of template for various situations. On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes. ==See also== {{Commons templates see also}} {{Sandbox other||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:Wikinews| |}}}} [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Caution|There is a consensus that in mainspace, interwiki links to Wikinews should only be made as per the [[Wikipedia:External links|external links guideline]]. This generally rules out the use of this template in the middle of articles. The relevant discussion can be found at [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)/Archive 152#Restrict Wikinews links in articles]].}} {{High-use|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}} ==Usage== As supported by [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]], this template may be used to add a [[:en:Wikinews|Wikinews]] link to a Wikipedia article. Note that this template generates an [[Help:Interwikimedia links|InterWikimedia link]] and is not intended to represent sources for Wikipedia articles. Links to pages on the Wikinews site: * Box format ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews|SomeArticleTitle}}''': Creates box with link to article ''SomeArticleTitle''. ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews category|SomeCategoryTitle}}''': Creates box with link to category ''SomeCategoryTitle''. * Line format ** '''{{tlp|Wikinews-inline|SomeArticleTitle}}''': Creates a line with link to article ''SomeArticleTitle''. * To link in-line with other text, create an interwiki link in the format: | SomeArticleTitle. {| border="1" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="3" |- ! Template !! What it makes !! Where it goes |- | rowspan=3|{{[[Template:Wikinews|Wikinews]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews|Links]] | {{Wikinews|insert article name here}} | * {{Wikinews|insert article name here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. * Uses [[:en:Parameter|Parameter]] (i.e. ''insert article name here'') for a manual link. * To make it appear on the left, use the parameter position=left. |- | {{Wikinews|Insert page name 1 here | Insert page name 2 here | Insert page name 3 here | Insert page name 4 here | Insert page name 5 here}} | * {{Wikinews|Insert page name 1 here|Insert page name 2 here|Insert page name 3 here|Insert page name 4 here|Insert page name 5 here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. |- | {{wikinews|has=insert description here| Insert page name 1 here }} | * {{Wikinews{{!}}has=insert description here{{!}}Insert page name 1 here }} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. * Allows for a custom "Wikinews has..." message. |- | {{[[Template:Wikinews category|Wikinews category]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews category|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews category|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews category|Links]] | {{Wikinews category|Insert category name here}} | * {{Wikinews category|Insert category name here}} * Placed next to the discussion of the event. |- | {{[[Template:Wikinews-inline|{{nowrap|Wikinews-inline}}]]}}
[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:Wikinews-inline|action=edit}} Edit]
[[Template talk:Wikinews-inline|Talk]]
[[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Wikinews-inline|Links]] | {{Wikinews-inline|insert article name here}} | * {{Wikinews-inline|insert article name here}} * Produces a bulleted list item on a line by itself. * Uses [[:en:Parameter|Parameter]] (i.e. ''insert article name here'') for a manual link. |} ===Location=== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]] {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in the main body of the article.''' {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns.''' This template is normally placed at the top of the [[WP:External links]] section. Please do not create an otherwise-empty ==External links== section for this template. Instead, consider using {{tlx|Wikinews-inline}}, or placing this template at the top of the last section on the page (usually a [[WP:CITE|citation-related]] section). See [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]] for further recommendations about the best choice of template for various situations. On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes. ==See also== {{Commons templates see also}} {{Sandbox other||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:Wikinews| |}}}} [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
